headline: EBay, Palo Alto, Microchip Technology And A Financial Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: EBay shares gained 2.6% to close at $116.13 on Friday while Palo Alto gained 1.9% to settle at $242.83 during the session.

headline: 3 Unprofitable Stocks That Concern Us
summary: Unprofitable companies face headwinds as they struggle to keep operating expenses under control. Some may be investing heavily, but the majority fail to convert spending into sustainable growth.
